content.text: I'll read each frame to judge against the rubric.

[
{"ruleId":"V1","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The amber probe plus four periwinkle candidates and their lilac score bars form one coherent system with the probe as the moving focus; nothing else competes.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V2","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The frame presents the probe, four candidates, and four score bars as a single covarying interactive rather than four unrelated novel ideas.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V3","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Labels c1..c4 and 'probe' sit at their arrow tips and each score bar carries its own c1..c4 caption; no legend or key is present.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V4","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"On-screen text is limited to the instructional annotation and object labels, all referring to visible arrows and bars.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V5","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The title, candidate labels, and mono score digits are all rendered legibly at the shown resolutions including the 375px frame.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V6","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"The unit circle, all arrows, labels, and the row of score bars sit fully inside every frame with margins.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V7","pass":false,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"In orthogonal-1280 the amber 'probe' label is stamped over the 'c3' label, and in initial-1280 and initial-375 the 'probe' label overlaps the 'c1' label and dot.","suggestion":"Offset the probe's label dynamically so it clears candidate tip labels as the probe sweeps past c1 and c3."},
{"ruleId":"V8","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Amber probe, periwinkle candidates, lilac score bars, and cream labels are used consistently across all states with no concept switching color.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V9","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Every element carries content; the amber circle reads as the unit-length reference for the vectors, not decoration.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V10","pass":true,"severity":"blocking","evidence":"Each driven state matches its promise: aligned peaks c1 at 1.0, orthogonal peaks c3 with c1 at 0.0, anti-aligned drops c1 to -1.0 below baseline, and length-cheat stretches c1 to a bolded 1.3 past c2's 1.0.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V11","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The score bars sit below the vectors but each is captioned with its candidate name, keeping the arrow-to-bar link readable.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V12","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"not applicable: frames are independent driven states rather than a continuous build sequence.","suggestion":""},
{"ruleId":"V13","pass":true,"severity":"advisory","evidence":"The composition has generous margins and clear negative space between the vector cluster and the score row.","suggestion":""}
]
